title: Flee the City of Destruction
description: Stop pretending the burden is harmless. Receive Evangelist's direction, then leave while mercy still calls.
description_zh: 不要再假装重担无害。领受传道者的指引，趁怜悯仍在呼唤时离开。

steps.description: Tell Evangelist the truth about your burden.
steps.description_zh: 向传道者诚实说出你的重担。

steps.description: Leave through the eastern gate without turning back.
